nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes FitzRandolph was born in 1240, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, was 50 and her mother, Alice de Stavelegh, was 41. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Alan FitzAlan. She died after 1272, and was buried in Masham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes FitzRandolph est née en 1240, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Alice de Stavelegh, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Alan FitzAlan. Elle est décédée après 1272, et a été enterrée à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes FitzRandolph 1240 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth 50 und ihre Mutter Alice de Stavelegh 41. Sie hatte mit Alan FitzAlan mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1272 und wurde in Masham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzRandolph è nata il nel 1240 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Alice de Stavelegh, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Alan FitzAlan. Morì dopo il 1272, e fu sepolta a Masham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzRandolphが1240年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworthは50歳，母Alice de Staveleghは41歳であった。彼女はAlan FitzAlanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1272年以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzRandolph(이)가 1240년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Stavelegh(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Alan FitzAlan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 마샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzRandolph nasceu em 1240, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Stavelegh, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Alan FitzAlan. Ela faleceu após 1272, e foi sepultada em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes FitzRandolph родилась в 1240 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Stavelegh, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Alan FitzAlan. Она умерла после 1272 г. и была похоронена в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes FitzRandolph nació en 1240, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Alice de Stavelegh, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Alan FitzAlan. Murió después de 1272, y fue sepultada en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
